summary: Update mode regression run for Defense Connect enhanced marketplace. Fixed 3 failing Playwright specs caused by UI changes (search suggestion testids, conditional clear-filters button, technical specs tab). Added 12 new frontend tests for enhanced features. Added 10 new backend tests for new API endpoints.
changes_fixed: Search suggestion testids changed from 'suggestion-0' to 'suggestion-product-0/supplier-0/category-0' (categorized dropdown). Updated main-feature.spec.ts and golden-path.spec.ts.
clear-filters-btn is conditional (only renders when activeFilterCount > 0). Updated test to apply a filter first before checking for button.
TECHNICAL SPECIFICATIONS heading is now inside the 'Technical Specs' tab (not default Overview tab). Updated test to click tab first.
new_tests_added: Product page tabs: Overview, Technical Specs, Applications
Supplier page trust indicators (years experience, active products)
Search empty state 'No Direct Match Found' with expert CTA
Category page enhanced filters (subcategory, availability, rating)
Category page filter apply and clear flow
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Tests use existing DB records.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 spec files (core-flows, main-feature, secondary-features, golden-path) fully updated and passing. Backend tests now cover filter-options and related-products endpoints. Search suggestions dropdown is categorized into Products/Suppliers/Categories sections with testids: suggestion-product-N, suggestion-supplier-N, suggestion-category-N. Technical Specs content is in a tab (click role='tab' name='Technical Specs' first). clear-filters-btn on category page only appears when a filter is active. Profile completeness meter is on supplier page. New /api/filter-options and /api/products/{slug}/related endpoints are functional.
